Refresh statistical baselines for drift: run the runner on known-good data so `schema_snapshots/baselines.json` updates means/stddev for numeric columns, or delete baselines to re-establish on next pass.

After schema or data fixes: `uv run python contracts/generator.py` for this producer, then `uv run python contracts/schema_analyzer.py --contract-id week3-document-refinery-extractions --since "7 days ago" --output validation_reports/schema_evolution_week3.json` and commit new files under `schema_snapshots/week3-document-refinery-extractions/`.
